_notes: Business supply is 6.6% so pure business is infeasible. Channel
leans business + tech, fills with politics (financial politics /
policy / tariffs). Zero out entertainment/sports/world, crush video.
2026-05-26: Added cluster_title_blocklist to filter pure earnings-report/
stock-price/sales-volume content — ZH business avg_avp only 5.3% across 13 videos.
These story types (财报解读, 股价涨跌, 销量数字) consistently fail to retain viewers.
Keeper stories: pricing mechanism reveals, institutional failure, hidden business logic.
